tasks.name: Fix Missing Translations in Arabic Locale
tasks.description: Address the missing translation for 'ProfilePage.logoutButton' in the Arabic locale file. This task involves identifying the missing key in the Arabic translation file and adding the appropriate translation for the logout button.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Examine the Arabic locale file (messages/ar.json) to confirm the missing translation
2. Add the missing 'ProfilePage.logoutButton' key with the translation 'تسجيل الخروج'
3. Verify the translation is properly formatted in JSON and consistent with other logout button translations in the application
4. Test the Arabic locale to ensure the translation appears correctly on the profile page
tasks.summary: Successfully added the missing 'ProfilePage.logoutButton' translation with the value 'تسجيل الخروج' to the Arabic locale file. The translation is correctly formatted in JSON and is consistent with the English and French logout button translations. The translation appears correctly on the profile page when using the Arabic locale.

tasks.name: Enhance Arabic Translations Quality
tasks.description: Improve the quality and professionalism of Arabic translations throughout the application by addressing orthography, terminology standardization, and natural phrasing. Make the language more formal and academic.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Review the entire Arabic locale file for orthographic issues (hamza placement, shadda marks)
2. Standardize terminology across the application, especially for technical terms
3. Replace generic placeholder text with more natural Arabic phrasing
4. Fix grammatical issues and word choices to make the language more formal and academic
5. Ensure consistent translation of UI elements across the application
tasks.summary: Successfully improved Arabic translations throughout the application with professional and academic language. Fixed orthographical issues including proper hamza placement and shadda marks. Standardized terminology across the application for technical terms, enhanced placeholder text with natural Arabic phrasing, and improved grammatical structures for more formal language. The revisions maintain consistency with existing UI elements while elevating the quality of the Arabic localization.

tasks.name: Standardize Translations Across Language Files
tasks.description: Create consistency across English, French, and Arabic language files by standardizing logout button translations, merging duplicate messages, creating consistent validation structure, and standardizing placeholders and punctuation.
tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Standardize the logout button translation consistently as 'Logout' (EN), 'Déconnexion' (FR), and 'تسجيل الخروج' (AR)
2. Merge duplicate password mismatch messages to use a single consistent format
3. Create consistent validation message structure across all languages
4. Standardize placeholder formatting, particularly for password fields (using bullet characters '••••••••')
5. Remove trailing periods from validation messages for consistency
6. Standardize password requirements to 8 characters across all languages
tasks.summary: Successfully standardized translations across all language files (English, French, Arabic). Implemented consistent logout button translations, merged duplicate password mismatch messages, and created a uniform validation message structure. Standardized placeholder formatting for password fields using bullet characters, removed trailing periods from validation messages, and ensured password requirements consistently specify 8 characters across all languages. These changes create a more cohesive user experience regardless of the selected language.
